title: rubus moluccanus var. lanatus
intro: Rubus moluccanus var. lanatus, also known as the Moluccan raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus moluccanus var. lanatus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases such as cancer and neurodegenerative disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
